project.name: nxt-ai-development
project.description: NXT AI Development Framework - Multi-agent autonomous development system

decisions.title: Bash hooks over Python for telemetry
decisions.context: Hooks need zero dependencies to work on any machine
decisions.decision: Rewrite hooks in pure bash + curl, keep Python as fallback
consequences: Slightly less feature-rich than Python version

decisions.title: Supabase for centralized telemetry
decisions.context: Team needs visibility into framework usage across developers
decisions.decision: Use self-hosted Supabase at nxtsupabase.gruponxt.dev with pg-meta SQL endpoint

decisions.title: Fusion of UX + UI agents into Design
decisions.context: Separate UX and UI agents caused fragmentation in design workflow
decisions.decision: Merge nxt-ux and nxt-uidev into single nxt-design agent

decisions.title: Direct execution over Claude CLI
decisions.context: External Claude CLI required API key and added complexity
decisions.decision: Slash commands instruct Claude to read agent files and execute directly
consequences: All execution within Claude Code session

decisions.title: NXT Scorer - Score-aware planning
decisions.context: Orchestrator needed objective data to decide which agents to include in plans
decisions.decision: Created nxt-scorer (12 areas, 41 metrics) that writes .nxt/scores.json. Orchestrator reads scores at planning time and auto-injects remediation agents when area score < 5.0

decisions.title: NXT as Claude Code Plugin - Viable path confirmed
decisions.context: Need to distribute NXT framework to other projects/teams without copying files manually
decisions.decision: Package NXT as Claude Code plugin using .claude-plugin/plugin.json format. Publish to marketplace via https://clau.de/plugin-directory-submission. MCP server optional for Python tools.
consequences: 34 agents + 44 commands available in any project
Need to separate framework (distributable) from state (.nxt/, per-project)
Plugin format verified: same as feature-dev, code-review, ralph-loop (official plugins)

recent_tasks.task: Full project deep analysis + documentation sync (34 agents, 28 skills, 44 commands)
NXT Scorer implementation (12 areas, 41 metrics) + score-aware planning
Plugin system discovery and viability analysis (49 plugins verified)
Docker compose, benchmarks, load tests, 5 new test files created
pyproject.toml, CONTRIBUTING.md, runbook, safety/threat docs created
Backup/alerting SOPs, plugin manifest, postmortem template, onboarding script
CI upgraded to 9 quality gates, requirements pinned with pip-audit
Score raised from 6.8 to 9.0 - 289 tests passing, 0 failures

common_patterns: Version sync needed between config files
Test tasks accumulate in state.json and need cleanup
Hooks need bash-first approach for portability
Documentation gets outdated when agents/skills are added - always update AGENTS.md, SKILLS.md, CLAUDE.md together
learned_preferences: User prefers autonomous execution without confirmation
Framework targets team-level visibility via telemetry
User wants deep validation before presenting conclusions to leadership
Plugin distribution is a strategic priority for the team

next_steps.priority_1: Package NXT as Claude Code plugin (.claude-plugin/plugin.json)
next_steps.priority_2: Address scorer critical areas: producto (4.0), performance (4.5)
plugin_checklist: Restructure to plugin format (agents/, commands/, skills/)
Separate framework files from per-project state
Optional: Create MCP server for Python tools
